summary:
There is no evidence linking polymorphisms in the ADRB genes to transient tachypnea of the newborn. The condition results primarily from delayed clearance of fetal lung fluid due to absence of labor-related catecholamines, independent of genetic variations in beta-adrenergic receptors.  
\boxed{B}

The condition results primarily from delayed clearance of fetal lung fluid due to absence of labor-related catecholamines, independent of genetic variations in beta-adrenergic receptors.  
\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
